title: Set date international format for all users system-wide
excerpt: All my board users are within a single country that uses a certain convention for date formats.  I want an ability like currently exists in my profile date time setting to select and impose this on ALL my system users.  …

posts.author: Nevin (Nevin Grieve)
posts.cookedHtml: All my board users are within a single country that uses a certain convention for date formats. I want an ability like currently exists in my profile date time setting to select and impose this on ALL my system users. Effectively the same that exists, but mandate a default time/date format for my team
